name: toolbelt-agent
description: Bring one governed Toolbelt agent — its tools, wrenches/playbooks, and persona — into Claude. One extension = one agent.

toolbelt_agent_name.title: Agent name
toolbelt_agent_name.description: A friendly name for this agent (e.g. Chief-of-Staff). Optional — Claude learns it automatically. Used to name the act_as_<agent> prompt.

toolbelt_workspace_id.title: Agent workspace ID
toolbelt_workspace_id.description: The Toolbelt workspace ID of the assistant you want in Claude. Its tools, wrenches, and persona are brought in.

toolbelt_api_key.title: Toolbelt API key
toolbelt_api_key.description: Your Toolbelt API key. Stored in your OS keychain (sensitive); sent as an Authorization: Bearer header, never in a URL.
